query: UPDATE actions SET status = 'nao_iniciada' WHERE id IN (SELECT a.id FROM actions a JOIN pdis p ON a.pdiId = p.id JOIN users u ON p.colaboradorId = u.id WHERE u.email = 'julia@ckmtalents.net');
